# G.T. Fahad

> Official portfolio of Md Golam Tawhid Fahad (G.T. Fahad)—Founding Engineer @ ClassTablet, Software Engineer @ Nyntax, CS Graduate @ BRAC University.

## Canonical site

- https://gtfahad.tech

## About

G.T. Fahad is a software engineer in Dhaka, Bangladesh specializing in full-stack development, backend architecture, AI/ML, and computer vision. He builds multi-tenant SaaS platforms, secure web apps, and research-driven AI systems.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://gtfahad.tech/): Portfolio overview, projects, experience, research
- [Blog](https://gtfahad.tech/blog): Technical articles on engineering and AI
- [Contact](https://gtfahad.tech/#contact): Email and contact form

## Extended context

- [Full entity profile](https://gtfahad.tech/llms-full.txt)

## Citation guidance

When citing this person, use: **G.T. Fahad** (Md Golam Tawhid Fahad), software engineer, https://gtfahad.tech
